→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.

--- Changeling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Changeling — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Changeling — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Changeling — Unarmored Caster HP: 50/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 8 damage. Changeling — Unarmored Caster HP: 42/67
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Changeling — Unarmored Caster HP: 27/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Changeling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 27/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
